title: coelas procumbens
intro: Coelas procumbens, also known as Cola nut, is a species of evergreen tree native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Coelas procumbens are attributed to its high caffeine content, which has been used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cola nut include improved cardiovascular health, increased energy, and enhanced cognitive function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, Coelas procumbens is often used in teas, infusions, and tonics, as well as being used as a stimulant in traditional African medicine.
